evidence_summary: VN-12 keeps يُحَرِّفُونَهُۥ as component-only Form II finite verb plus object suffix evidence.
VN-12 flags ثَقِفْتُمُوهُمْ as a token-only finite verb row needing subject and object suffix accounting.
VN-12 flags تُخَالِطُوهُمْ as a finite Form III verb with a plural subject marker and attached object pronoun.
VN-12 flags ٱلصَّيْدِ as a definite nominal row routed through a verb entry, requiring POS and article preservation.
VN-12 flags مَالَ as readable but not rich-certified because nominal case and construct role require exact review.
VN-12 keeps كَزَرْعٍ as component-only comparison/preposition plus governed nominal host evidence.
VN-12 flags فَرَشْنَٰهَا as a finite first-person plural verb with attached object suffix.
VN-12 keeps وَفُرُشٍۢ as component-only conjunction plus nominal host evidence.
VN-12 keeps أَضَآءَتْ as component-only finite Form IV verb evidence with feminine subject marking.
VN-12 flags أَضَآءَ as a token-only finite Form IV verb needing finite wording rather than a dictionary infinitive.
VN-12 flags قَسَتْ as a finite verb with feminine subject marking that must not collapse to an infinitive gloss.
VN-12 keeps فَلْيُؤَدِّ as component-only fāʾ plus imperative lām plus jussive verb evidence.
